label: radiation risk (named concept)
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab]) AND ("radiation risk"[tiab] OR "radiation-induced cancer"[tiab] OR "radiation induced cancer"[tiab] OR "lifetime attributable risk"[tiab] OR "carcinogenic risk"[tiab])

label: risk of NOT scanning (named concept, optics removed)
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab]) AND ("risk of not scanning"[tiab] OR "not scanning"[tiab] OR "non-scanning"[tiab] OR "withholding CT"[tiab] OR "withholding imaging"[tiab] OR "deferred CT"[tiab] OR "forgoing CT"[tiab] OR "forgoing imaging"[tiab]) NOT (spectrometer[tiab] OR spectral[tiab] OR fluorescence[tiab] OR microscopy[tiab] OR multiplexing[tiab])

label: delay-to-scan (time-to-CT / door-to-CT, clean)
query: ("time to CT"[tiab] OR "time-to-CT"[tiab] OR "door-to-CT"[tiab] OR "door to CT"[tiab] OR "time to computed tomography"[tiab] OR "delayed CT scan"[tiab] OR "delay in CT"[tiab]) NOT ("delayed phase"[tiab] OR "delayed-phase"[tiab] OR "delayed enhancement"[tiab] OR "delayed contrast"[tiab] OR "time-resolved"[tiab])

label: delayed/missed diagnosis co-mentioning CT (off-concept proxy)
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab]) AND ("delayed diagnosis"[tiab] OR "diagnostic delay"[tiab] OR "missed diagnosis"[tiab])
